title: SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST panics on duration_days if SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS >= 2^32
description: ws.rs SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST handler: 'let days = params.duration_days as i64' (line 1809) then 'chrono::Duration::days(days)' (line 1810). chrono::Duration::days calls expect() and panics when days > ~106_751_991. params.duration_days is u32 (max 4_294_967_295). The guard 'params.duration_days as u64 > max_days' (line 1799) only blocks if SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS < u32::MAX. An operator setting SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS=5_000_000_000 and a client sending duration_days=u32::MAX passes the guard, then panics in the Tokio task. The panic terminates the connection handler; the relay process survives but the panic is network-triggered.
